clusters.title: --min-rss excludes workers exactly at the requested threshold

member_findings.title: --min-rss excludes workers exactly at the requested threshold
member_findings.impact: The help text and PR contract say workers using at least MB should be shown, but the predicate uses `rss_mb > min_rss_mb`. A worker whose RSS equals `--min-rss` is incorrectly hidden, including `--min-rss 0` hiding readable zero-MiB results.
member_findings.fix: Change the predicate to `rss_mb >= min_rss_mb` so the boundary matches the documented inclusive threshold.
